How it works Features Security Share One Get One Link
Privacy

We collect nothing.

No email. No phone number. No name. No analytics. No cookies. No tracking pixels. No fingerprinting. No third-party scripts. The Cloudflare Worker that serves this page does not log who visited or what they downloaded. The relays do not log anything about the people using the network.

Asked tomorrow who downloaded One Link or who paired with whom, the honest answer is "the information lives only on the devices the people own, where it belongs." That is by design. The architecture is the policy.

For the avoidance of doubt:

  • Your identity lives on your device. There is no user database.
  • The protocol is the business model. There is no advertising surface.
  • The work is free, forever. There is no transaction to record.
  • Your data stays with you. There is nothing to transfer because everything is yours from the start.
  • Your connections live between you and the people you chose. The relays carry sealed envelopes they cannot open.

Last updated 2026-05-16. See the full security model.

One Link

A free, private network for messages, files, and devices. Owned by no one. Belongs to everyone.
